title: carex × rotae
intro: Carex × rotae is a hybrid of sedge plants that combines characteristics of Carex rostrata and Carex limosa, often found in wetland areas. The plant has been studied for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Carex × rotae are thought to include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Herbal preparations of Carex × rotae are typically made from the plant's rhizomes and roots, which can be dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture.
